subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Bear thou witness unto that whereunto God Himself hath testified, by His Own Self, ere the creation of His names and attributes - that there is none other God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان اشهدی بما شهد الله لذاته بذاته قبل خلق اسمائه و صفاته انه لا اله هو و الذی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
